description: Manual placement overrides to resolve AC Mains clearance violations (Hybrid Locking)

U_GATE.description: Anchor component. X=25.8mm ensures >6mm clearance from AC Mains while allowing USB_D+ routing.

C_BOOT.description: Bootstrap capacitor. Placed in Safe Zone but allowed to drift to resolve overlaps.

C_VCC.description: Bypass capacitor. Placed in Safe Zone but allowed to drift to resolve overlaps.
